meaning: n.(织品的)质地,(木材,岩石等的)纹理,(皮肤)肌理,(文艺作品)结构
examples: It has an orange flavour and smooth texture.
Each brick also varies slightly in tone, texture and size.
Within a month, both the texture and condition of your hair should improve.
In the 18th and 19th centuries, the Industrial Revolution transformed the socioeconomic texture of Britain.
On top of the new texture pack, you can also download a Japanese voice-over.
